violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the bathroom was lacking proper handwashing signage. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
Inspector observed dead rodent under retail shelf. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the retail shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, rodent droppings and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
The condensate from the walk-in cooler is draining into the 3 bay sink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

The floors throughout the facility (especially under retail shelves) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
